scripts.dev:api: cd backend && uv run uvicorn amdb.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.check:api: cd backend && uv run ruff check src tests && uv run mypy src && uv run pytest
scripts.ci:web: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
scripts.ci: pnpm run ci:web && pnpm run check:api
